backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor defining Product, SiteSettings (with Shopify fields), and UserProfile types, with query/update methods for products and site settings, protected by role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades the actor state from the old SiteSettings structure to the new one by adding default Shopify integration fields (shopifyStoreDomain, shopifyStorefrontAccessToken, shopifyEnabled).
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs to their associated source files, components, and test IDs, covering Shopify integration fields, admin UI subsection, and Shopify product import panel.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key details of each component, hook, page, and utility in the React frontend.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point applying Tailwind base/components/utilities and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including sidebar, chart, and UI element variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the React SPA with the title 'Glow Shop — Luxury Cosmetics', Google Fonts preconnect links, and a root div mounting the Vite/React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (home, shop, product detail, cart, checkout, order confirmation, admin) wrapped in a shared Layout with a Sonner Toaster.
frontend/src/components/CartItem.tsx: Cart line-item component displaying product image, category, name, unit price, a quantity selector, line total, and a remove button, with optimistic local quantity state and toast notifications for errors.
frontend/src/components/DeleteProductDia: A confirmation alert dialog for deleting a product, using the `useDeleteProduct` mutation hook and displaying success/error toasts on completion.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedProducts: Displays a grid of up to 8 featured products fetched via `useGetFeaturedProducts`, with loading skeletons, error/empty states, and a link to the full shop.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, brand promises, copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/HeroBanner.tsx: Full-width hero section with a background image (with fallback), gradient overlay, headline copy, and a 'Shop Now' call-to-action button linking to the shop page.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a sticky Navigation header, a main content area via `<Outlet />`, and a Footer.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, desktop and mobile nav links, an active-route indicator, and a cart icon showing the current item count.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Product card component displaying image, category, name, price, and an add-to-cart button with out-of-stock handling, hover effects, and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/ProductFilters.t: Sidebar filter panel for the shop page, providing category pill buttons and a price range slider with a clear-all option when filters are active.
frontend/src/components/ProductFormDialo: A modal dialog component for adding or editing a product, with form validation and fields for name, category, description, price, image URL, stock, and featured status.
frontend/src/components/ProductTable.tsx: Renders a table of products with image, category, price, stock, and featured columns, and supports edit/delete actions via dialog modals.
frontend/src/components/PromoBanner.tsx: A horizontally scrolling marquee banner displaying promotional messages over a styled background image.
frontend/src/components/QuantitySelector: A numeric input component with increment/decrement buttons for selecting a quantity within a configurable min/max range.
frontend/src/components/ShopifyImportPan: A panel that fetches and displays Shopify products using store settings, allowing users to import individual products into the local catalog.
frontend/src/components/SiteSettingsSect: A settings form for managing site configuration including hero banner image, store info, currency, and Shopify integration credentials.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to expose login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for fetching and mutating products, site settings, shopping cart, and orders via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, and defines custom CSS variables for the brand's color tokens (ivory, blush, gold) in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabbed sections for managing products (add/edit/delete/refresh) and site settings, displaying product stats and a Shopify import panel.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page that displays cart items with quantities and a subtotal summary, handling loading skeletons and an empty-cart state with a link to the shop.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Renders the checkout page showing cart items, subtotal, shipping, and total, and handles order placement by calling placeOrder/clearCart mutations then navigating to the confirmation page.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Composes the home page with a hero banner, promo banner, featured products, a features section, and a CTA section linking to the shop.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage: Displays an order confirmation screen, reading the order ID from sessionStorage and showing next-steps messaging with links to continue shopping or return home.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Shows a single product's image, details, stock status, and quantity selector, and handles adding the item to the cart with toast feedback.
frontend/src/pages/ShopPage.tsx: Renders the full product listing page with category and price-range filters, a responsive sidebar, and a filtered product grid.
frontend/src/types.ts: Defines shared TypeScript interfaces for the store's core data models: Product, CartItem, ShoppingCart, Order, and SiteSettings.
frontend/src/utils/imageHelpers.ts: Provides helper functions that return static asset paths for the hero banner, promo banner, product placeholder, and resolved product images.
frontend/src/utils/session.ts: Manages a persistent browser session ID by generating and storing a UUID in localStorage for cart/session tracking.
frontend/src/utils/shopifyApi.ts: Fetches products from a Shopify store via the Storefront GraphQL API, defining the query, response types, and error handling.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, an OKLCH-based color palette (including brand colors like ivory, blush, and gold), border radii, shadows, and animation keyframes for the cosmetics storefront.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 11) tracking the e-commerce cosmetics site's existing features, architectural notes, and known issues for build planning purposes.
